name: Familiar-Possessed - Dharc
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>憑</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>依</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>い</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>装</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>そう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>着</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ちゃく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ダルク
desc: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Dharc the Dark Charmer" you control and 1 face-up DARK monster you control to the Graveyard. When you do: You can add 1 Level 3 or 4 LIGHT Spellcaster-Type monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card was Special Summoned by this effect and attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing Battle Damage to your opponent.
mnst_eff: You can Special Summon this card (from your hand or Deck) by sending 1 face-up "Dharc the Dark Charmer" you control and 1 face-up DARK monster you control to the Graveyard. When you do: You can add 1 Level 3 or 4 LIGHT Spellcaster-Type monster from your Deck to your hand. If this card was Special Summoned by this effect and attacks a Defense Position monster, inflict piercing Battle Damage to your opponent.

action: Sends from field to Graveyard for Special Summon
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
